description_long: This apartment building features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a mix of light beige and dark exterior finishes. The structure includes large, rectangular windows arranged in a regular pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front area has a covered carport and a small landscaped garden with a palm tree, while the rear boasts a private outdoor space with a swimming pool, patio furniture, and a shaded lounge area. The building is surrounded by a low wall, creating a private courtyard that includes both green and paved areas. The overall layout suggests two stories, with the upper floor set back from the lower, creating a stepped profile. The use of glass, concrete, and metal elements gives the building a sleek, contemporary appearance.
description: A modern, two-story apartment building with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of beige and dark exterior finishes. Features include a carport, landscaped garden, private courtyard, and a swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, main entrance, and landscaped garden with a palm tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the beige exterior, large windows, and part of the private courtyard with outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio furniture, and shaded lounge area within the courtyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, palm tree, and a glimpse of the pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern with large rectangular panes evenly spaced across the facade and sides, providing a balanced and modern appearance.
